caption: A man with greyish-blonde hair, glasses, and large black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a small bow tie, and gold suspenders. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands with her arms crossed. The room appears to be a studio or retail space, with a sign reading "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed picture of a gold shield logo on the wall. Overlaid on the screen is a logo that reads "#REAL TALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "REAL TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to speak, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions while the woman in the background remains stationary. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the man's profile as he addresses the microphone.
